task_completion.description: Open the 'Anytown Chemical Company' facility record in CAMEO Data Manager.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CAMEO Data Manager application is open and the facility record for 'Anytown Chemical Company' is displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Tier II Certification or Signatory section of the facility record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GUI shows the specific tab, window, or section dedicated to Tier II Certification or signatory details.

task_completion.description: Enter the certifier's Name and Title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Name field contains 'Maria T. Rodriguez' and the Title field contains 'Director of Environmental Health & Safety'.
The Date Signed field is populated with 'March 01, 2024' (or a standard date format equivalent accepted by the software).

task_completion.description: Enter the certifier's Email and Phone number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Email field contains 'm.rodriguez@anytownchem.com' and the Phone field contains '(555) 867-5309'.
The agent clicks a 'Save', 'OK', or 'Done' button, or navigates back to the main facility list showing the record has been successfully updated without unsaved change prompts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the CAMEO Data Manager graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual CAMEO Data Manager application windows being manipulated, rather than terminal windows executing database modification scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not type the answers into a text editor to fake completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data is entered into the specific form fields of the CAMEO Data Manager application, not in Notepad, WordPad, or a generic text editor.

integrity.description: The agent modified the correct facility record.
integrity.visual_evidence: The context of the window where data is entered clearly indicates it belongs to 'Anytown Chemical Company', not a newly created blank record or a different facility.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Facility: 'Anytown Chemical Company'. Target values to verify in the GUI: Name: 'Maria T. Rodriguez', Title: 'Director of Environmental Health & Safety', Date Signed: 'March 01, 2024', Email: 'm.rodriguez@anytownchem.com', Phone: '(555) 867-5309'.
